ValidationRule.description: There is an issue with Lead being reassigned after being assigned due to integration. This will block it.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( Lead_Auto_Assign__c , $User.fxUserFullName__c ="Service Admin" ,OR( NOT(ISNEW()) , NOW() > CreatedDate ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: V.RULE_LEAD_009: Service Admin can not trigger Lead Auto Assign a 2nd time
